page: Microsoft Azure EC128es_v5 is an ECEV5-family virtual machine configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server allocates 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on external storage solutions, and is designated as Premium Storage capable.

With its dedicated CPU allocation and substantial memory footprint, the EC128es_v5 is engineered for workloads requiring high memory density and consistent compute performance. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs focuses its resource profile entirely on memory and processing capacity. This design offers qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise workloads that scale memory independently of local disk space, avoiding the overhead of unused physical storage or accelerator hardware.

This server type is suited for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, and data processing pipelines. The 128 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB RAM configuration supports heavy concurrent processing demands, making it appropriate for relational database management systems, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound analytics workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure EC128es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEV5 family, featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. Managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server provides 768.0 GB of system memory, establishing a resource density of 6.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. Designed for resource-intensive applications, the EC128es_v5 offers a specialized hardware profile that maximizes memory capacity relative to compute resources. This configuration is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data processing workloads that demand high memory availability without the need for local physical disks or hardware accelerators.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC128es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 768.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring one hundred twenty-eight dedicated cores and seven hundred sixty-eight gigabytes of system memory.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB of RAM per core
Premium Storage capable configuration with no local disk storage
Virtualized using the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
